column1: Ildemaro Vargas stands out as the most reliable pick, riding a strong recent run and hitting safely in nearly 87% of games. He draws a favorable matchup with a platoon edge and a hitter-friendly park, making him a steady option. Mickey Moniak also benefits from a soft matchup and park boost, offering solid consistency near the top of the order. Matt Olson and Bobby Witt Jr. are viable alternatives, but Vargas’s combination of form and situation is the clear advantage.
